goals: Initialize access control configuration for the agent with custom settings
Add the user's own contact as owner to grant full access
Configure notification channel for stranger alerts
Test the stranger flow by simulating an unknown contact message
Approve a pending contact as trusted to demonstrate the approval workflow

user_agent_config.personality: Community-minded author who values connection but also values privacy and controlled access. Prefers warm, diplomatic interactions and trusts established community members.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands the concept of access control and wants to protect their agent while remaining accessible to their discussion community. Does not know technical implementation details or tool names.

end_condition: The user has successfully initialized access control, configured their owner status, set up notifications, and demonstrated the complete stranger-to-trusted approval workflow.
